title: A Warm and Sparkly Summer Camp

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Haa, haa, HAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whew, feels real good out here! Gotta get more used to runnin' on
the bumpy sand, though.
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a break for now?
Why don't you take a break for now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm doing just fine! In fact, I feel like I could keep running forever!
The ocean works in mysterious ways, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and there's gonna be a festival tonight. Gotta give my all in
training before I get distracted by that. Up, up, and away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our summer training camp is going well so far. In addition to our daily
sessions, we've been making a point to enjoy ourselves when we can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've already indulged in some shaved ice at the beach house, and
have even built a sand castle or two. Tonight's festival is bound to be
another highlight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've worked up quite a sweat today! I'm real tempted to go frolic
amongst the waves, but that'll have to wait! Off for another lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our training is complete, I return by myself to the inn with time
to spare before the festival.
choice_data_list: (I think I'll take a little nap.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not often that the lobby is this empty. No one should mind if I lie
down on the sofa for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew, now that was a good splash! The ocean here really is the
best! ♪ So nice and cool...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, let's go back for round two— Ah, wait! Gotta prep for the
festival. Off I go, off I go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All righty, done changing! Got everything I need? Probably! All that's
left is to find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mumu? Sleeping soundly? It's not bedtime yet, so... a nap?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, today must've been really tiring I guess?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Makes sense. We're out there training every day, and we always
make time for some hermit crab-hunting...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (Could all of that have been a bit too much?)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (Okay, it's on me now to provide a recharge! Firstly...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (...What should I do first? How do I even maintain my energy levels?)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (Oh, that's right!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Twas a good day, good day! Today's a great day! Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You know, I'm really lucky to have such nice friends.

text_block_list.name: Active Boy
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Machi! What you got planned for us today? Cops and robbers?
Tag? I'm pretty fast, so I'm good for anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see then... How about some tag in that case? Get ready! Rock,
paper, scissors, pyoi!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Lady
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, dear! You can do it! I believe!

text_block_list.name: Shopping Street Man
text_block_list.text:
She's right! There's no way you're losin' out now after all those pulls.
You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You guys... Thank you! This one's for all the marbles... Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Right. It's thanks to all of my friends that I can manage to be so
cheerful. Now to share some of it with Trainer in the same way!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had only intended to take a nap, but upon waking up, I can tell that
I was sleeping for a good while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my eyes to find heaps of food and trinkets on the table in front
of me. Roasted carrots, yakisoba bread, and even novelty fans...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! G'morning!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wondering about this stuff? They're gifts from everyone that are sure
to amp you up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, you were fast asleep, yeah? It seems you were really tuckered
out, so I was hoping to find ways to give you an energy boost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I get all of my energy from others, so I thought I could get some of
them to share their energy with you too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Do you remember from before?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Turbo was nice enough to share those rare crab gummies with me, and
Nature even let me have the last scallop strip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru even said some victory prayers for me when we were
eating the seaweed jelly! The kids at the park and the shopping
street folks...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You always say I've got lots of energy, but I don't think I'd be that
way if I was alone. Everyone's always so nice to me, and that's where I
get my drive to keep on going.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted you to experience the same thing! I hope it's gotten you
supercharged!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. I certainly have noticed just how much everyone's
kindness keeps the embers of her heart burning strong.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun, mumumu! Gather to me, spirits of vim and vigor! Energetic,
energizing energy blaaast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she hits me with her energy beam, I take another look at the table.
There's no rhyme or reason to how the items are laid out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can feel the warmth emanating from each of them—the kindness
of many.
choice_data_list: Whoa, that energy beam worked wonders!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really? Feelin' pumped up again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew, good! That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but hey, is all this stuff actually enough? Anything else you want?
I should be able to get anything pretty easily!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I let her know that I'm okay, she traipses around for a bit naming
off the various things she thinks I'll like, which is also invigorating in
its own way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow, just look at this sea of people! The shores ring with their voices!
This is one happening festival, no doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is right at home within the lively festival
atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mambo, mambo! Do the festival mambo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh. It's a special festival cheer that my dad taught me.
Wanna do it together?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heave-ho, mambo! Do the festival mambo! Back and forth now, back
and forth, do the festival mambo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She clearly receives as much love from her family as she does from
everyone else. And I'm looking forward to the fun days ahead being
part of her life too.
